narrative:
South Bloomfield-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 465 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
